response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and diverse programming experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and outdated NI LabWindows roles, with no recent or domain-relevant application.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure
Demonstrated ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No recent or professional C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks any demonstrable fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain experience
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with core C++/SQL Server/Oracle requirements
